block.truemusic.speaker: Speaker
item.truemusic.speaker: Speaker
config.truemusic.title: True Music Configuration
config.truemusic.cache.directory.tooltip: Directory name for cached audio files (relative to game directory)
config.truemusic.cache.maxSizeMB.tooltip: Maximum cache size in megabytes. Set to 0 for unlimited (not recommended). Oldest files are deleted when limit is exceeded.
config.truemusic.audio.maxDistance.toolt: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which audio can be heard. Audio volume becomes 0 beyond this distance.
config.truemusic.debug.enableLogging.too: Enable verbose debug logging for troubleshooting
config.truemusic.transfer.chunkSize.tool: Audio chunk size in bytes. Larger = fewer packets, faster transfer.
config.truemusic.transfer.maxBytesPerTic: Max bytes/tick for all audio transfers combined. Increase if players experience slow downloads. Decrease if audio transfers affect game responsiveness.
config.truemusic.transfer.maxBytesPerPla: Max Bytes Per Player Per Tick
Max bytes/tick per player. Ensures fair bandwidth sharing.
config.truemusic.download.connectTimeout: Connection timeout when downloading audio from URLs
config.truemusic.download.readTimeoutSec: Read timeout when downloading audio from URLs
